patch.value: Package scaffolds declare current SDK compatibility floor

Generated package/extension scaffolds import modern TypeScript SDK primitives but still declare pm_min_version 2026.5.0 and peerDependency '*'. Raise the generated compatibility floor to the first released host that supports TypeScript-loaded scaffolds and the SDK helpers, document it in generated README output, and cover imperative/declarative scaffold metadata so package authors get accurate install/load guidance.

Generated package and extension manifests declare a pm_min_version that matches the SDK/runtime primitives they use; generated package.json peerDependencies enforce the same floor; package-author README text explains the floor; scaffold tests cover imperative and declarative package output; verification includes focused scaffold tests, coverage/static checks, and an isolated temp-package install/doctor smoke.

value.author: codex-20260627
value.text: Duplicate check: pm search "scaffold compatibility floor pm_min_version peerDependencies TypeScript package init" --status all --limit 30 found related closed scaffold lineages (pm-09rh, pm-2c28, pm-8mxg, pm-2p7a, pm-frou) but no active item for the stale generated compatibility floor. Creating this child under pm-ugqx.

value.note: raise generated scaffold compatibility floor and package peer dependency
cover generated scaffold manifest/readme/peer compatibility metadata

patch.value: cover package-init runtime scaffold metadata through runExtension

value.note: cover generated scaffold manifest/readme/peer compatibility metadata

value.author: codex-20260627
value.text: Evidence: implementation raises generated package/extension scaffold compatibility metadata to the first released host floor for TypeScript-loaded SDK define*/testing scaffolds (2026.6.24) and changes generated package peerDependencies to >=2026.6.24. Focused verification passed: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/extensions/extension-scaffold-define-guidance.spec.ts tests/unit/extensions/extension-command.spec.ts (137 tests). Repo-wide coverage passed: node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage -> 256 files, 5137 tests, 100/100/100/100 (31769 statements, 24690 branches, 5414 functions, 30490 lines). Static quality, contracts, health, package doctor, pnpm audit, security scan, Sentry/telemetry gate, and changelog:pm:check with pm-changelog 2026.6.27 all passed. Manual isolated temp smoke passed in /tmp/tmp.nBhO547azz with PM_PATH/PM_GLOBAL_PATH sandbox: init, package init --declarative, metadata assertions, npm install, npm run typecheck, npm test, install --project, context kit ping, package doctor, health, and validate. Note: the earlier linked pm test run recorded false failures for coverage and changelog because pm test executes linked commands inside an empty schema-sandbox tracker; the same real-repo commands passed outside that linked-test sandbox.

patch.value: Generated scaffolds now declare the correct 2026.6.24 SDK/runtime compatibility floor in manifests, README text, and package peerDependencies, with focused tests, 100% repo coverage, static/release-adjacent gates, and isolated package-author smoke passing.

author: codex-20260627

patch.value: Raised generated package and extension scaffold compatibility metadata to the first released host that supports TypeScript-loaded SDK define*/testing scaffolds, and covered the generated manifest, README, and peer dependency surfaces.
Generated scaffolds should tell package authors and host installers the real minimum pm CLI version required by the emitted TypeScript SDK primitives.

Generated package and extension scaffolds now emit pm_min_version 2026.6.24, package README text says Scaffolded as 2026.6.24, generated package.json declares @unbrained/pm-cli >=2026.6.24, focused scaffold tests pass, repo coverage remains 100/100/100/100, and an isolated package-author smoke installs and dispatches the scaffold successfully.

message: Backfill closure metadata for scaffold compatibility floor work
